query:
SELECT 
  i.id,
  i.tenantId,
  i.productId,
  p.sku,
  i.locationId,
  wl.code as locationCode,
  i.batch,
  i.quantity,
  i.reservedQuantity,
  i.status,
  i.updatedAt
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
WHERE i.quantity <= 0
ORDER BY i.updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
